tagline: Commercial-ready fan operations, wayfinding, translation, and sponsor revenue layer
heroTitle: Atlanta FIFA guest operations, revenue, and safety in one system.
heroSubtitle: A color-coded, white-label operating system for multilingual fan journeys across the stadium, the city, and sponsor touchpoints.

surfaces.title: Guest Web
surfaces.description: Concierge search, venue map, rewards, cultural food discovery, emergency mode.

surfaces.title: Staff Console
surfaces.description: Translation-assisted support, queue workflows, rapid escalation.

surfaces.title: Admin Control
surfaces.description: POIs, campaigns, emergency phrases, translation approvals.

surfaces.title: Revenue Console
surfaces.description: Executive dashboard with campaign, language, and intent monetization views.

journey: Fan enters in their own language.
Agentic concierge interprets intent and location.
Cultural ranking + RAG return relevant venue and city guidance.
Transparent sponsor offers and rewards are injected when eligible.
Safety routes bypass monetization and use deterministic approved phrases.
